basicPropertyValues.val: A lightweight OWL 2 DL ontology modeling the energy news media landscape as observed through social media posts.
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a news article referenced by an embedded link in a social media post
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a social media account that shares energy news
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a quantified metric of power generation or storage capability measured in MW, GW, MWh, or equivalent units
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a hyperlink embedded within a Post pointing to an external web resource with link metadata such as title, description, and URI
A Process representing a significant occurrence in the energy sector including conferences, policy announcements, regulatory decisions, and market disruptions
A Process representing the planning, permitting, construction, and commissioning activity for developing energy infrastructure such as power plants, renewable installations, and grid upgrades
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a class of technological innovations used in energy generation, storage, transmission, or efficiency
An owl:Class whose instances are skos:Concept individuals representing subject areas within the energy sector used to classify news articles
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a curated social media feed for energy content
A Site that represents a country region or subnational area relevant to energy news coverage
A GeographicEntity that represents a region with defined electrical grid boundaries managed by a specific operator
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a financial or trading mechanism for energy commodities, capacity, or credits including carbon permits, PPAs, and RECs
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a multimedia object such as an image, video, or document attached to or embedded in a Post
An Object that represents a company agency or institutional body mentioned in energy news
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a regulatory, legislative, or economic tool used to incentivize, mandate, or restrict energy production or technology adoption
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a social media post sharing energy content
An Object representing a facility that generates electricity or thermal energy, characterized by fuel type, capacity, and operational status
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a quantified price or cost metric for energy, technology, or commodities at a specific point in time
A GenericallyDependentContinuant representing a categorical characterization of an energy project phase from planning through decommissioning
An Object that represents a news media outlet or website that publishes articles
An Organization with authority to create, enforce, or adjudicate energy policy and grid operations within a defined jurisdiction
An Object representing a specific renewable energy facility such as a solar array, wind farm, or geothermal plant, characterized by technology type and capacity
An owl:Class whose instances are named individuals representing social media platforms
Links an Article to an EnergyProject it covers
Links an Article to an EnergyTechnology it discusses
Links an Article to an EnergyTopic individual it covers
Links a physical energy facility (PowerPlant or RenewableInstallation) to the EnergyProject development process that produced it
Links an EnergyProject to its capacity measurement
Links a Post to its embedded external link
Links an Article to a GeographicEntity representing its geographic focus
Links a Post to its media attachments
Links an Organization to an EnergyTopic sector it operates in
Links an EnergyProject to its current status
Links a RenewableInstallation to its technology type
Links a reply Post to the parent Post it responds to
Links a RegulatoryBody or PolicyInstrument to the GeographicEntity representing its jurisdictional scope
Links an Article to an Organization mentioned in its coverage
Links an AuthorAccount or Feed to the SocialMediaPlatform it belongs to
Links a GridZone to its operating organization
Links a Post to the AuthorAccount who created it
Links an Article to the Publication that published it
Links a Post to the Article it shares via embedded link
The alternative text description for the media attachment
The unit of measurement for capacity such as MW, GW, MWh, or GWh
The timestamp when a Post was created
The description or summary text of an Article
The display name of an AuthorAccount
The handle or username string for an AuthorAccount
The number of likes on a Post
The preview description text of the embedded external link
The preview title text of the embedded external link
The target URI of the embedded external link
The date when the capacity measurement was recorded
The URI of the media resource such as an image or video
The MIME type of the media attachment such as image/jpeg or video/mp4
The text content of a Post
The ISO 4217 currency code for the price value such as USD, EUR, or GBP
The date when the price was recorded or observed
The numeric price or cost value
The publication date of an Article
The number of replies to a Post
The number of reposts of a Post
The domain name string of a Publication
The URI of the preview thumbnail image for the embedded external link
The headline or title string of an Article
The numeric capacity value expressed in megawatts

nodes.lbl: AI and data center energy demand

A skos:Concept representing decarbonization of the aviation sector through sustainable fuels and electric aircraft

A skos:Concept representing energy generated from naturally replenishing sources such as solar wind and hydro

A GeographicEntity representing the Canadian province of Alberta a major oil, wind, and carbon policy market
A GeographicEntity representing the U.S. state of California a major solar, storage, and grid innovation market
A GeographicEntity representing China the global leader in renewable energy manufacturing and critical minerals
